ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy of the model */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Testing accuracy of the model */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "nhidden" INTEGER /* Number of hidden units in the model */,
  "layer_form" TEXT /* Form of the neural network layer */,
  "nlayers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  " epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used during training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the training run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the training run */,
  "training_time" INTEGER /* Training time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_project_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_map_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "model_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each model configuration

Number of hidden units in the model
Form of the neural network layer

Number of epochs used during training

ID of the user who created the project
